changeSet.author: librelog
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE media_upload ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY, station_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES station(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, original_file_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, final_file_name VARCHAR(255), duration_seconds INT, artist_tag VARCHAR(255), title_tag VARCHAR(255), status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UPLOADED', error TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), CONSTRAINT chk_media_upload_status CHECK (status IN ('UPLOADED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'IMPORTED', 'FAILED')) ); CREATE INDEX idx_media_upload_station_created ON media_upload(station_id, created_at);
